subcodes.first_line: Thus doth the Most Exalted Pen proclaim: Rejoice, O concourse of the faithful, for the Crimson Ark hath sailed upon the sea of names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذا ینادی قلم الاعلی بان ابشروا یا ملا الوفا بما جرت فلک الحمرا علی لجه الاسما
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment
